laws.title: Ohio Minimum Wage — $10.92/hr (Effective January 1, 2026)
laws.summary: Ohio's state minimum wage remains at $10.92/hr as of January 1, 2026. This rate has boeen statutory since 2009 (unlike federal and most other states). No annual CPI adjustment is provided. Counties like Cuyahoga and Franklin have higher local wages ($13.91/hr to $13.99/hr respectively).
compliance_actions: Verify payroll is set to at least $10.92/hr
Check any Appendix local ordinances for county, city, or town wage requirements
Make sure pay is tracked properly if employees work in multiple counties
Post the changes if there have been any changes to local rates
